svg.title: DalPay system architecture diagram
svg.desc: Six-layer architecture: access channels at top, through API gateway, backend services, mobile money integration, data layer, and admin/reporting at bottom. External integrations with ZAAD and E-Dahab shown on the right.

g.text: JWT auth · rate limiting · request routing · versioning · logging
Taxpayer DB · Tax demand DB · Transaction ledger (immutable) · Analytics store
Ministry of Finance dashboard · Officer workstation · Compliance reports · Export
